description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a dark, nearly black exterior and a metallic top featuring a pull tab. The front of the can displays a large, ornate label with gold and cream tones, featuring decorative scrollwork, a banner, and crossed broomsticks as part of the design. The label text is bold and stylized, surrounded by a laurel wreath motif, giving the can a vintage, whimsical appearance. The can's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The top and bottom rims are slightly raised, typical of beverage cans. No visible condensation or wetness is present on the exterior.
description: A tall, dark aluminum can with a glossy finish and a detailed, vintage-style label in gold and cream, featuring ornate graphics and a pull tab on top.
description_view_0: The can is mostly in shadow, with only the metallic top and faint label details visible.
description_view_1: The front label is fully visible, showcasing ornate gold and cream graphics with decorative elements and bold text.
description_view_2: The can is angled, revealing the side of the label and the continuation of the decorative design.
description_view_3: The can is mostly in shadow again, with minimal label detail visible and the metallic top slightly highlighted.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features ornate gold and cream graphics with decorative scrollwork, a banner, and crossed broomsticks, all set against a dark background. The typography is bold and stylized, giving the design a vintage and whimsical feel.
